# InvoiceFlow

> InvoiceFlow is a browser-based invoicing app for freelancers and small agencies. It turns client and project details into a polished, professional PDF invoice in under 60 seconds, with a live preview that updates as you type.

InvoiceFlow is a freemium SaaS that runs entirely in the browser — no installation and no account required to create your first invoice. It focuses on doing invoicing exceptionally well rather than replicating full accounting suites.

## What it does

- **Create invoices fast**: Fill in sender, client, and line items and get a pixel-perfect invoice in about a minute.
- **Live preview**: The invoice renders in real time as you type — no "generate" button or delay.
- **PDF export**: Download print-ready PDF invoices (Pro feature).
- **Multi-currency**: Supports USD, EUR, GBP, CAD, AUD, JPY, INR, and BRL, plus tax and discount handling.
- **Recurring invoices**: Set up schedules, clients, and history for repeat billing.
- **Client portal**: A hosted recipient view for clients to view invoices.
- **Branding**: Custom logo and accent colors on invoices (Pro feature).

## Pricing

- **Free** — $0/mo: 5 invoices per month, PDF export, 1 template.
- **Pro** — $12/mo: Unlimited invoices, 10+ templates, custom logo and brand colors, payment status tracking, client management, priority support.
- **Agency** — $29/mo: Everything in Pro plus up to 10 team members, white-label option, and API access.

## Who it's for

Design-conscious freelancers, contractors, and small agencies who want a fast, beautiful way to bill clients — without the complexity and cost of tools like QuickBooks or FreshBooks.

## Key pages

- [Home / overview](https://invoice-flow.blinkpowered.com/): Product overview, features, and pricing.
- [Invoice creator](https://invoice-flow.blinkpowered.com/create): The core tool for building an invoice with live preview.
- [Recurring invoices](https://invoice-flow.blinkpowered.com/recurring): Schedules and history for repeat billing.

## Common questions

- **Is InvoiceFlow free?** Yes. The free tier lets you create up to 5 invoices per month with no account required to start.
- **How fast is it?** Most users go from opening the app to downloading a finished PDF in under 60 seconds.
- **Do I need to install anything?** No. InvoiceFlow runs entirely in your browser.
- **Which currencies are supported?** USD, EUR, GBP, CAD, AUD, JPY, INR, and BRL.
